content.text:
All tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added `moonstone: 25` entry to the `BASE_PREMIUMS` map in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-21_08-35-47_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts`
- Result: All tests now pass (10 passing, 36 todo)
- Approach: Minimal change — a single new key/value in the existing record. The quote logic already sums base premiums and applies the first-insurance surcharge and processing fee, so 2 runes (50) + 1 moonstone (25) = 75 base, +10% = 82.5, +5 fee = 87.5, ceil to 88. No new logic or branches required.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
